mapper.update: UPDATE stocks SET stock = stock - #{count} WHERE book_id = #{bookid}
mapper.select: SELECT id,book_id, stock FROM stocks WHERE book_id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE stocks SET stock = #{stock} WHERE book_id= #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.title, b.price, b.category, s.stock FROM books b LEFT JOIN stocks s ON b.id = s.book_id
